user_goal: 按 MVP PRD 推进 Global ETF Momentum 的可复现研究闭环：在 B008 研究级数据基础上，实现手动、默认禁用、CI 不依赖的公开数据导入与本地 snapshot workflow，补齐 snapshot manifest、显式数据加载、质量门禁和 research run artifact，同时继续保持 no-live/no-secret/no-network-by-default/no-broker/no-AI safety guards。

evaluator_feedback.summary: B009 F006 reverification found B009-F006-1 is not fully fixed. Full checks pass (pytest 61, ruff, compileall, mypy), but real import-to-workflow artifacts still do not reference the manifest because import_public_data writes {snapshot_id}-manifest.json while load_snapshot_prices looks for {snapshot_file_stem}-manifest.json.

findings.issue: Real imported snapshot workflow still emits snapshot_manifest = null.
findings.evidence: import_public_data output_file=data/public-cache/eval-provider-manual-download.json, manifest_file=data/public-cache/public:eval-provider:9aa9f876caec416a-manifest.json; run_fixture_workflow on output_file produced report data.snapshot_manifest=None and research_run snapshot_reference.manifest=None.
findings.required_fix: Align importer and loader manifest naming/reference semantics and add an E2E regression that calls import_public_data(), then run_fixture_workflow() on result.output_file, asserting report/research-run reference result.manifest_file and result.snapshot_id.

generator_handoff: Generator fixed B009-F006-1 in fixing round 1. DataSnapshot now carries optional manifest_path and manifest_snapshot_id loaded from an adjacent *-manifest.json for explicit imported snapshots. JSON reports now include data.snapshot_manifest, Markdown reports print the snapshot manifest reference, and research-run artifacts include snapshot_reference.manifest. Added regression tests proving imported snapshot JSON/research-run artifacts reference the manifest path and manifest snapshot_id while committed fixture reports keep snapshot_manifest null. Full local checks pass: .venv/bin/python -m pytest (61 passed), .venv/bin/python -m ruff check ., .venv/bin/python -m compileall trade tests, and .venv/bin/python -m mypy --install-types --non-interactive trade. Evaluator should reverifying B009 F006.

session_notes.planner: 2026-05-13: B008 was done with clean signoff. User agreed to next batch recommendation from MVP PRD perspective: B009 Public Data Snapshot MVP. Created spec and feature list; moved status to building for Generator F001. Key intent is to bridge synthetic fixture mechanics to reproducible local research snapshots while preserving offline CI and safety guards.
session_notes.generator: 2026-05-13: Fixed B009-F006-1 and moved status to reverifying. Explicit imported snapshots now load adjacent *-manifest.json lineage into DataSnapshot and reports/research-run artifacts include manifest path + manifest snapshot_id. Regression tests added; full checks pass: pytest 61 passed, ruff, compileall, mypy.
session_notes.evaluator: 2026-05-13: B009 F006 reverification FAIL. Checks passed (pytest 61, ruff, compileall, mypy), but B009-F006-1 remains incomplete for real importer output: import_public_data writes {snapshot_id}-manifest.json while load_snapshot_prices searches {snapshot_file_stem}-manifest.json, so report/research-run snapshot_manifest remains None. Report: docs/test-reports/B009-public-data-snapshot-mvp-reverification-2026-05-13.md. Status moved back to fixing; no signoff.
